name_en: 5BA281, Miu miu new mini tote, new compact size cute and versatile, stylish and chic, exquisite details, classic embossed letter logo adds unique style and recognition, continues Miu miu retro style, casual and free, comes with detachable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap, can be worn over shoulder, handbag, or crossbody, practical, satin lining, with patch pocket, Dimensions: 20 cm X 24 cm
